# tree-sitter-nix

Vendored from: `https://github.com/nix-community/tree-sitter-nix`

Revision: `3d0173d903e630b6e14d17f1cf79488791379ded`

Fetched for the parser foundation work on 2026-07-02. The grammar is used through `github.com/smacker/go-tree-sitter` via a local CGO bridge in `internal/syntax`.
